case_title: BAY MEDIA FEDERAL CREDIT UNION VS. LAURA JACINTO

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY PLAINTIFF BAY MEDIA FEDERAL CREDIT UNION

ORDER "GRANTED" ON REQUEST TO ADVANCE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY THE PLAINTIFF. *(THE PARTIES SHALL APPEAR TO INFORM THE COURT CONCERNING THE STATUS OF THEIR SETTLEMENT, AND FOR TRIAL IF NECESSARY)*. PER COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT.
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY PLAINTIFF BAY MEDIA FEDERAL CREDIT UNION

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BAY MEDIA FEDERAL CREDIT UNION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JACINTO, LAURA $269.33 PRINCIPAL, $22.50 INTEREST, $92.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $384.33, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM, ADVANCED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF FROM DEC-01-2010 TO SMALL CLAIMS - CLAIM CALENDAR ON AUG-18-2010 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506.*(THE PARTIES SHALL APPEAR TO INFORM THE COURT CONCERNING THE STATUS OF THEIR SETTLEMENT, AND FOR TRIAL IF NECESSARY).*
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-18-2010 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO SEP-01-2010 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $269.33 FILED BY BAY MEDIA FEDERAL CREDIT UNION AS TO DEFENDANT JACINTO, LAURA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-30-2010 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-30-2010 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO DEC-01-2010 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. IF NO APPEARANCE, CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-01-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-01-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE THE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING. THE REQUEST IS GRANTED. -COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT-
